global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on product images and a strong call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a sense of urgency.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid color background that fills the entire canvas, providing a clean backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular area showcasing product images with a subtle outline, indicating a focus on the items being promoted.

elements.description: Another rectangular area within the main subject, featuring a different product image, visually distinct from the others.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom of the ad, featuring a bold message encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo area at the top left, featuring the brand name 'CrispBox' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small text area at the top, indicating 'UGC' in a simple font, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with vibrant colors, new collection drop.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned centrally, the main subject is in the center, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop, CrispBox, UGC, Start now
